# basalt-ui v1.0.0
# Opinionated framework for Mantine-based React apps — theme, app shell, visx charts, toolchain presets
#
# basalt-ui is an opinionated framework for Mantine-based React apps.
# It provides a theme + cssVariablesResolver, a BasaltProvider, an app shell
# (BasaltShell + sidebar/mobile-nav/breadcrumbs), a visx chart system with a
# three-tier --vx-* CSS-variable token system, adapter batteries for TanStack
# Query/Router, Mantine forms/notifications/commands, a streaming-chat agent
# layer, and toolchain presets (oxlint, oxfmt, tsconfig, lefthook, CI).
# BasaltRegister is the unifying type-augmentation interface for consumer-side
# extension (series tokens, command registry, notification registry).
#
# Subpaths: use the exact import specifier below — do not guess.
# Charts and tokens are Mantine-free; the root (.) is Mantine-coupled.
# Optional peers are listed per subpath; install only what you use.

Package: basalt-ui
Version: 1.0.0

## basalt-ui
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui'
Description: BasaltProvider, createBasaltTheme, BasaltShell + sidebar/mobile-nav/breadcrumbs, NavCountBadge, SidebarAccount + the provider-agnostic account contract (BasaltAccountProps/State/Actions), ThemeToggle, ThreadWorkspace + thread-chat components
Layer: mantine-coupled
Rule: basalt-mantine

## basalt-ui/charts
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/charts'
Description: visx chart primitives, sparklines, hooks, and token re-exports (Mantine-free)
Layer: headless
Rule: basalt-charts

## basalt-ui/tokens
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/tokens'
Description: VX token refs, buildPaletteCss, defineSeries, seriesTokens, groupTokens, alpha (Mantine-free)
Layer: headless
Rule: basalt-tokens

## basalt-ui/theme-lab
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/theme-lab'
Description: ThemeLabControls, applyOverrides, COLOR_GROUPS for live theme inspection
Layer: mantine-coupled

## basalt-ui/vite
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/vite'
Description: basaltViteConfig(opts) — Vite preset for basalt-ui consumer apps
Layer: mantine-coupled

## basalt-ui/guard
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/guard'
Description: checkSource, GUARD_RULES, Finding types — the headless theme-guard core
Layer: headless

## basalt-ui/query
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/query'
Description: createBasaltQueryClient, transport-agnostic unwrap, lazy BasaltQueryDevtools
Layer: headless
Rule: basalt-query
OptionalPeers: @tanstack/react-query@^5.101.0, @tanstack/react-query-devtools@^5.101.0

## basalt-ui/router-tanstack
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/router-tanstack'
Description: TanStack Router bridge: useBasaltNav (active route) + useRouterBreadcrumbs
Layer: headless
Rule: basalt-router
OptionalPeers: @tanstack/react-router@^1.170.0

## basalt-ui/forms
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/forms'
Description: Mantine form adapter: useBasaltForm, field, FormErrorSummary, useFormDraft (Standard Schema)
Layer: mantine-coupled
Rule: basalt-forms
OptionalPeers: @mantine/form@^9.3.0

## basalt-ui/notifications
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/notifications'
Description: Mantine notifications: notify helpers, typed registry, persisted history, NotificationBell
Layer: mantine-coupled
Rule: basalt-notifications
OptionalPeers: @mantine/notifications@^9.3.0

## basalt-ui/commands
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/commands'
Description: typed command bus + overlay controller, toSpotlightActions, ShortcutsHelp, BasaltOverlays
Layer: mantine-coupled
Rule: basalt-commands
OptionalPeers: @mantine/spotlight@^9.3.0, @mantine/modals@^9.3.0, @tanstack/react-hotkeys@0.10.0

## basalt-ui/data
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/data'
Description: Convenience barrel pulling both TanStack Table + Virtual peer groups: BasaltDataTable, BasaltVirtualList (Mantine-rendered) — prefer ./data/table or ./data/virtual for per-feature opt-in
Layer: mantine-coupled
Rule: basalt-data
OptionalPeers: @tanstack/react-table@>=8 <9, @tanstack/react-virtual@>=3 <4

## basalt-ui/data/table
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/data/table'
Description: BasaltDataTable: a sortable data table over TanStack Table, rendered with Mantine (Mantine-rendered)
Layer: mantine-coupled
Rule: basalt-data
OptionalPeers: @tanstack/react-table@>=8 <9

## basalt-ui/data/virtual
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/data/virtual'
Description: BasaltVirtualList: a windowed virtual list over TanStack Virtual, rendered with Mantine (Mantine-rendered)
Layer: mantine-coupled
Rule: basalt-data
OptionalPeers: @tanstack/react-virtual@>=3 <4

## basalt-ui/agent
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/agent'
Description: Headless streaming-chat layer: useAgentStream, edenTransport, PartList, plus the multi-thread createThreadsStore + useAgentThreadRuns + outcome-resolver seam (Mantine-free)
Layer: headless
Rule: basalt-agent
OptionalPeers: react-markdown@^10.1.0, remark-gfm@^4.0.1, use-stick-to-bottom@^1.1.6

## basalt-ui/state
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/state'
Description: createPersistedState (versioned localStorage) + useOnlineStatus — Mantine-free state primitives
Layer: headless
Rule: basalt-state

## basalt-ui/connectivity
Import: import { ... } from 'basalt-ui/connectivity'
Description: ConnectivityProvider (aggregates browser online/offline, React Query onlineManager, SSE, and health-check pings into one status), useConnectivity, and ConnectivityIndicator — auto-mounted by BasaltProvider
Layer: mantine-coupled
Rule: basalt-mantine
OptionalPeers: @tanstack/react-query@^5.101.0

## basalt-ui/styles.css
Asset: basalt-ui/styles.css
Description: Mandatory first CSS import — @layer basalt base styles, iOS input safety net, font stack
Layer: non-js-asset

## basalt-ui/configs/*
Asset: basalt-ui/configs/*
Description: Raw toolchain presets for consumer extends: oxlint.json, oxfmt.json, tsconfig.*.json, lefthook.yml, check.yml
Layer: non-js-asset

## basalt-ui/llms.txt
Asset: basalt-ui/llms.txt
Description: Machine-readable surface map — one entry per published subpath with import specifier, description, layer, and optional peers
Layer: non-js-asset
